message.content:
@startuml
title Toggle Switch

participant Ctc as "Ctc"
participant TrackController as "TrackController"

participant TrackModel as "TrackModel"
participant Block as "Block"
participant Switch as "Switch"

rectangle "Toggle Switch" {
    TrackModel
    Block
    Switch
}

Ctc ->> TrackController: Select Block
TrackController -> TrackModel: setSwitchStatus(Block, direction)
TrackModel -> Block: getBlock()
Block -> TrackModel: getSwitch()
TrackModel -> Switch: setSwitchState("normal" or "alternate")
Switch -> TrackController: new switch status
TrackController -> Ctc: updateSwitchStatus(Block, status)
Ctc -> Ctc: new switch status
Ctc -> TrackController: updateSwitchStatus(Block, status)

@enduml
